ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "package_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the package type */,
  "thermal_resistance" REAL /* Thermal resistance value of the component */,
  "unit_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit type */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the condition */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the thermal resistance data */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer */,
  "date_measured" TEXT /* Date when the thermal resistance was measured */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the thermal resistance data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_unit_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_type_id") REFERENCES unit_types ("unit_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_package_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_type_id") REFERENCES package_types ("package_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_types" (
  "package_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package type */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package type */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the package */,
  "size" TEXT /* Physical size of the package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_types" (
  "unit_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit type */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "temperature_range" TEXT /* Temperature range under which the thermal resistance was measured */,
  "humidity" TEXT /* Humidity level during the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person at the manufacturer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "thermal_resistance" REAL /* Thermal resistance value of the component */,
  "unit_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit type */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the condition */,
  "date_measured" TEXT /* Date when the thermal resistance was measured */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the thermal resistance data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_unit_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_type_id") REFERENCES unit_types ("unit_type_id")
)
